The '''Drake Theatre''' was located in the Commercial District of Estalle Island on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]] ([[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]). It was a beautifully designed theatre with two stages and it tended to run more contemporary plays and operas than the [[Leocald Opera House]], also located on the island.

==Sources==
